name: Weak Encryption Enabled and Kerberoast
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: @neu5ron
SIGMA Title: Weak Encryption Enabled and Kerberoast
SIGMA Description: Detects scenario where weak encryption is enabled for a user profile which could be used for hash/password cracking.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4738 AND (((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%8___%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%9___%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%a___%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%b___%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%c___%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%d___%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%e___%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%f___%') AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%8___%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%9___%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%a___%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%b___%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%c___%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%d___%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%e___%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%f___%')))) OR ((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%1____%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%3____%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%5____%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%7____%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%9____%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%b____%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%d____%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%f____%') AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%1____%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%3____%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%5____%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%7____%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%9____%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%b____%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%d____%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%f____%')))) OR ((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%8__%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%9__%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%a__%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%b__%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%c__%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%d__%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%e__%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%f__%') AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%8__%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%9__%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%a__%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%b__%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%c__%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%d__%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%e__%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%f__%'))))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Weak Encryption Enabled and Kerberoast on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
